sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44449" key="*eu)me/neios2" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Εὐμέν-ειος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen> (sc. -<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μήν</foreign>), name of month at Pergamum, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">338.2</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
